_comment: PINNED Faster-Whisper `small` snapshot for the IMMUTABLE Phase 5 speech component. The bare `small` alias resolves the MOVING Hugging Face default (repo HEAD), so a rebuilt image could produce different analysis under the same version. This pins the exact Systran/faster-whisper-small revision + per-file SHA-256. fetch_model.py downloads THIS revision and FAILS the build on any digest mismatch; editor_speech.py loads ONLY this local snapshot with the network disabled. Changing repository/revision/digests requires bumping the analyzer bundle (speechVersion).
